title: Principal Fleet Manager at Delhivery Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Fleet Manager at Delhivery Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Fleet Manager looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Digital Technologies in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Digital Technologies:
Delhivery Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
